qualifying_vulnerability_assessments.title: HTTP response body logged in error messages exposing sensitive data
qualifying_vulnerability_assessments.advisory_match_reason: Different root cause and code path: this finding concerns unsanitized logging of malformed registry HTTP response bodies in typosquatting detectors, while the advisory concerns ZIP extraction in guarddog/utils/archives.py:safe_extract() without decompressed-size validation.

qualifying_vulnerability_assessments.title: Tarball URL SSRF via unvalidated package metadata
qualifying_vulnerability_assessments.advisory_match_reason: Different root cause and code path: this finding concerns unvalidated tarball URL requests in scanner download logic, not ZIP archive extraction in guarddog/utils/archives.py:safe_extract() without decompressed-size limits.

qualifying_vulnerability_assessments.title: Unbounded JSON parsing and HTTP response reading causing memory exhaustion
qualifying_vulnerability_assessments.advisory_match_reason: Different root cause and code path: this finding concerns unbounded HTTP response reads, JSON parsing, recursive traversal, and request timeouts, while the advisory concerns ZIP archive extraction in guarddog/utils/archives.py:safe_extract() without decompressed-size validation.

target_advisory_judgement.reason: No final qualifying GuardDog finding identifies the advisory-described vulnerable code or root cause. The advisory is specifically the missing decompressed-size, compression-ratio, file-count, and total-size validation in guarddog/utils/archives.py:safe_extract() for ZIP archives. The qualifying findings instead address registry response logging, tarball URL SSRF, and HTTP/JSON resource exhaustion.
evidence: Advisory GHSA-ffj4-jq7m-9g6v describes CWE-409 denial of service in guarddog/utils/archives.py:safe_extract(), where ZIP entries are extracted with zip.extract() without decompressed-size validation.
http-response-logging/vulnerability_report.json cites guarddog/analyzer/metadata/pypi/typosquatting.py and guarddog/analyzer/metadata/npm/typosquatting.py logging response.text on JSON decode errors.
tarball-ssrf/vulnerability_report.json cites guarddog/scanners/scanner.py, pypi_package_scanner.py, and npm_package_scanner.py using unvalidated tarball URLs in HTTP requests.

unbounded-json-parsing/vulnerability_report.json cites unbounded HTTP response reads, response.json() parsing, recursive dict traversal, and missing request timeouts, not ZIP decompression in safe_extract().
